gaps: AI training data practices not stated
Specific retention timelines for gameplay data unclear
Cross-game data sharing scope not fully transparent
label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on EA Privacy Policy through mid-2025. Notable: EA operates multiple game franchises with different age demographics. In-game purchases and monetization involve significant financial data collection. Sports games (Madden, FIFA/FC) have younger player bases. Targeted advertising pervasive across EA games. Cross-game progression increases data consolidation.
